name: pdf-mini-editor
description: Browser-based PDF editor. The deployed app is a single static index.html (+ sw.js), GENERATED by `npm run build` from the editable modules in src/ (app.js, i18n-*.js, app.css, index.template.html).

scripts.test: node tests/smoke.mjs && node tests/ruler.mjs && node tests/textdel.mjs && node tests/rulersnap.mjs && node tests/touch.mjs && node tests/qrpay.mjs && node tests/editcover.mjs && node tests/guides.mjs
